details: Wrote detailed Pac-Man implementation spec: 28x31 maze layout, 4 ghost AI personalities (Blinky chase, Pinky ambush, Inky simplified flank, Clyde shy), scatter/chase mode cycling, power pellet frightened mode, cornering input buffer, tile/pixel coordinate system, rendering approach, all named constants, pseudocode for every system, 16 acceptance criteria. Ready for BUILD next cycle.
next: BUILD pac-man (implement startPacMan in index.html, create meta.json)
